race.description: Nudgee / Sandhurst Fine Foods Mdn Plate
race.comment: CELTIC LIGHT (8) was well fancied last time out but after being in contention on the corner disappointed in finishing fourth over 1000m at Cunnamulla. Rates highly in this field and can turn things around. POTENCO (4) returns after four months in the paddock. Closed the last campaign with a fourth over 1400m at Goondiwindi. Good chance to break through. ELITE BLONDE (9) is a four-start maiden who could only manage to finish seventh at her latest appearance over 1200m at Cunnamulla. Draws well and fitter is expected to feature in the finish this time. TEAJAY (5) has been in the market at his recent starts but hasn't managed to break through, last start running fifth at Injune. Looks one for the minors.
